com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.keymanager

Enum KeyGenerateMethod

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<KeyGenerateMethod>
      • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.keymanager.KeyGenerateMethod
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<KeyGenerateMethod>

    public enum KeyGenerateMethod
extends java.lang.Enum<KeyGenerateMethod>
    key injection method.

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant and Description
      AES_DUKPT_UPDATE_IK 
      ANSI_X9143
      Generate a new key with ANSI-X9143
      CIPHER
      Load a cipher key which is encrypted by the specified KEK.
      CIPHER_VTB 
      CLEAR
      Load a clear key.
      DIVERSIFY_X
      Customized key derivation method, e.g.
      DUKPT_DERIVE
      Derive a new DUKPT key overwriting the old one, the KSN will increase after derivation.
      GISKE
      Key is generated under GISKE rules.
      HKDF
      Generate a new key with HKDF.
      PUP_2
      A customized key generation method, which is based on RedSys's requirement and similar to the TR31 method.
      RANDOM
      Generate a random key and store it in the specified index.
      RANDOM_OUT
      Generate and return a random key which is encrypted by the specified master key.
      RANDOM_OUT_TR31
      Generate and return a random TR31 key which is encrypted by the specified master key.
      TR31
      Key is generated under TR-31 rules.

      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.

      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • CLEAR

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod CLEAR
        Load a clear key.

      • CIPHER

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod CIPHER
        Load a cipher key which is encrypted by the specified KEK.

      • TR31

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod TR31
        Key is generated under TR-31 rules.

      • RANDOM

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod RANDOM
        Generate a random key and store it in the specified index.

      • RANDOM_OUT

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod RANDOM_OUT
        Generate and return a random key which is encrypted by the specified master key.

      • DUKPT_DERIVE

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod DUKPT_DERIVE
        Derive a new DUKPT key overwriting the old one, the KSN will increase after derivation.

      • DIVERSIFY_X

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod DIVERSIFY_X
        Customized key derivation method, e.g. In accordance to the Spanish requirements.

      • GISKE

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod GISKE
        Key is generated under GISKE rules.

      • RANDOM_OUT_TR31

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod RANDOM_OUT_TR31
        Generate and return a random TR31 key which is encrypted by the specified master key.

      • CIPHER_VTB

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod CIPHER_VTB

      • AES_DUKPT_UPDATE_IK

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod AES_DUKPT_UPDATE_IK

      • HKDF

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod HKDF
        Generate a new key with HKDF.

      • ANSI_X9143

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod ANSI_X9143
        Generate a new key with ANSI-X9143

      • PUP_2

        public static final KeyGenerateMethod PUP_2
        A customized key generation method, which is based on RedSys's requirement and similar to the TR31 method.

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static KeyGenerateMethod[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (KeyGenerateMethod c : KeyGenerateMethod.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static KeyGenerateMethod valueOf(java.lang.String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      • getCode

        public int getCode()
